MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Bradley Kass, Esq., from Kass & Kass Law Offices, 650-579-0612, for defendant and opposing party

No other Appearance. Tentative Ruling is adopted.
PLAINTIFFS CAFE TIRAMISU LLC, ANTO RESTAURANT GROUP LLC. AND THE NAPOLI GROUP LLC'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Overruled in its entirety. The challenged affirmative defenses are either adequately pled and/or the demurrer as to them serves no useful purpose. Any legitimate need for further information that plaintiffs have can be satisfied by propounding discovery. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-12-2011 Sustained
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT WAH CHAI LIAN AKA ALBERT LIAN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Demurrer overruled as to the 1st, 3rd, 4th and 6th causes of action. Demurrer sustained with 10 days leave to amend as to the 2nd cause of action for plaintiff to allege the fraud with greater specificity. Plaintiff's reference to important "facts" is vague and conclusory. Demurrer sustained with 10 days leave to amend as to the 5th cause of action for plaintiff to allege whether the agreement is oral. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
